title: Dhammapada 14: The Awakened One
description: The Buddha on what it means to be truly awake: seeing the world as it actually is.
introduction: The Buddha on what it means to be truly awake: seeing the world as it actually is.

translation.original_text: yassa jitaṃ nāvajīyati jitam assa no yāti koci loke | taṃ buddham anantagocaraṃ apadaṃ kena padena nessatha
translation.text: He whose victory cannot be undone, whose victory no one in the world can reach — by what track can you lead that trackless, awakened, infinite-ranging one?
